---
title: "Abhimanyu Raj Singh *Chandel*"
format: html
page-layout: full
css: styles.css
---

```{=html}
<section class="masthead" aria-label="Site header">
  <div class="masthead-media">
    <img src="images/Headshots.jpg" alt="Abhimanyu Raj Singh Chandel portrait" class="masthead-photo" />
  </div>
  <div class="masthead-copy">
    <p class="masthead-kicker">Data Ecologist | Spatial Modelling | Open Ecology Workflows</p>
    <h1>Abhimanyu Raj Singh <em>Chandel</em></h1>
    <p class="masthead-text">Environmental science, biodiversity modelling, and ecological decision-support for landscapes under change.</p>
  </div>
</section>

<nav class="tab-nav" aria-label="Sections">
  <button class="tab-btn is-active" type="button" data-tab="overview">Overview</button>
  <button class="tab-btn" type="button" data-tab="timeline">Timeline</button>
  <button class="tab-btn" type="button" data-tab="blogs">Idea-Blogs</button>
  <button class="tab-btn" type="button" data-tab="contact">Contact</button>
</nav>

<section class="tab-panel is-active" id="panel-overview" data-panel="overview">
  <section class="content-card overview-card">
    <h2>About Me</h2>
    <div class="overview-copy">
      <p>I began my journey in zoology, driven by a curiosity to understand how species interact within ecosystems. Today, I work as a Data Ecologist, applying environmental science, spatial modelling, and emerging technologies to explore how biodiversity responds to changing landscapes.</p>
      <p>My work focuses on inter- and intra-species interactions, ecosystem dependencies, and how these relationships shift under pressures like climate change and human disturbance. I use data-driven approaches such as species distribution models, occupancy analysis, and trait-based ecology to translate complex ecological patterns into insights that support conservation decisions.</p>
      <p>I am particularly interested in bridging the gap between research and real-world application. Through reproducible workflows, open science platforms, and tools like EcoCommons, I aim to make ecological modelling more accessible, scalable, and impactful for practitioners, researchers, and communities.</p>
      <p>Alongside my technical work, I am passionate about science communication and collaboration, ensuring that advanced ecological methods can be understood and applied beyond academia.</p>
      <p>Outside of work, I spend time exploring nature through photography, writing music inspired by the environment, hiking, and creating pollinator-friendly spaces, staying closely connected to the systems I study.</p>
    </div>

    <div class="overview-grid">
      <article class="spotlight-card">
        <h3>Background</h3>
        <ul>
          <li>MSc Environmental Protection and Climate Change</li>
          <li>BSc Zoology</li>
        </ul>
      </article>
      <article class="spotlight-card">
        <h3>What Drives Me</h3>
        <ul>
          <li>Understanding ecological interactions at multiple scales</li>
          <li>Applying technology to biodiversity conservation</li>
          <li>Building reproducible ecological and environmental workflows</li>
          <li>Connecting science to solutions and community impact</li>
        </ul>
      </article>
    </div>
  </section>
</section>

<section class="tab-panel" id="panel-timeline" data-panel="timeline">
  <div id="timeline-shell" class="timeline-shell">
{{< include _generated/timeline.html >}}
  </div>

  <section class="content-card">
    <h2>Focus Areas</h2>
    <div class="skills-cloud" aria-label="Skills">
      <span class="skill-pill">Ecological Modelling</span>
      <span class="skill-pill">Spatial Analysis (GIS)</span>
      <span class="skill-pill">Species Distribution Modelling</span>
      <span class="skill-pill">Trait-Based Ecology</span>
      <span class="skill-pill">Occupancy Analysis</span>
      <span class="skill-pill">Reproducible Workflows</span>
      <span class="skill-pill">Open Science Platforms</span>
      <span class="skill-pill">Science Communication</span>
    </div>

    <div class="overview-grid">
      <article class="spotlight-card">
        <h3>Highlighted Projects</h3>
        <ul>
          <li>Plant trait-environment modelling with AusTraits for conservation decisions</li>
          <li>Government and research use-case support across ACT, QLD, and NSW workflows</li>
          <li>Community restoration and biodiversity monitoring in Queensland and NSW</li>
        </ul>
      </article>
      <article class="spotlight-card">
        <h3>Interests</h3>
        <ul>
          <li>Ecology engineering and invasive species management</li>
          <li>Climate adaptation, habitat restoration, and decision-support systems</li>
          <li>Accessible modelling tools for practitioners and communities</li>
        </ul>
      </article>
    </div>
  </section>

  <footer class="button-container bottom-links" aria-label="External links">
    <a class="download-button" href="resume.pdf">Download Resume</a>
    <a class="download-button" href="https://www.ecocommons.org.au">Project Website</a>
    <a class="download-button" href="https://github.com/abhirscecocommons">Github</a>
    <a class="download-button" href="https://www.sciencedirect.com/science/article/pii/S1364815224003165">Recent Publication</a>
  </footer>
</section>

<section class="tab-panel" id="panel-blogs" data-panel="blogs">
  <section class="content-card">
    <h2>Idea-Blogs</h2>
    <p>Add files like <code>idea-pages/page3.txt</code> and render. Each new page file will appear here automatically.</p>
    <div id="idea-blog-list">
{{< include _generated/idea-blogs.html >}}
    </div>
  </section>
</section>

<section class="tab-panel" id="panel-contact" data-panel="contact">
  <section class="content-card">
    <h2>Contact</h2>
    <p>Send a comment or enquiry. This opens your mail app and prepares a message to <strong>abhirsc@outlook.com</strong>.</p>

    <div class="contact-grid">
      <article class="contact-card">
        <p class="contact-card-kicker">Professional</p>
        <h3>LinkedIn</h3>
        <p>Add your LinkedIn profile URL here for collaborations, speaking, and applied ecology connections.</p>
        <a class="contact-card-link" href="https://www.linkedin.com/" target="_blank" rel="noopener">Open LinkedIn</a>
      </article>
      <article class="contact-card">
        <p class="contact-card-kicker">Visual Journal</p>
        <h3>Instagram</h3>
        <p>Use this card for field photography, nature notes, and more informal updates from work and outdoors.</p>
        <a class="contact-card-link" href="https://www.instagram.com/" target="_blank" rel="noopener">Open Instagram</a>
      </article>
      <article class="contact-card">
        <p class="contact-card-kicker">Social Writing</p>
        <h3>Bluesky</h3>
        <p>A good fit for ecology threads, open science updates, and short-form reflections on biodiversity work.</p>
        <a class="contact-card-link" href="https://bsky.app/" target="_blank" rel="noopener">Open Bluesky</a>
      </article>
      <article class="contact-card">
        <p class="contact-card-kicker">Investor Portfolio</p>
        <h3>Cake / Birchal</h3>
        <p>Use this card for your investor profile and startup backing activity across mission-aligned ventures.</p>
        <a class="contact-card-link" href="https://birchal.com/" target="_blank" rel="noopener">Open Investor Portfolio</a>
      </article>
    </div>

    <div class="contact-grid">
      <article class="contact-card contact-card-wide">
        <p class="contact-card-kicker">Backed Projects</p>
        <h3>Startup Portfolio</h3>
        <ul class="contact-list">
          <li>RecycleSmart</li>
        </ul>
      </article>
    </div>

    <form id="contact-form" class="contact-form" novalidate>
      <label for="contact-name">Name</label>
      <input id="contact-name" name="name" type="text" required />

      <label for="contact-email">Email</label>
      <input id="contact-email" name="email" type="email" required />

      <label for="contact-subject">Subject</label>
      <input id="contact-subject" name="subject" type="text" placeholder="General enquiry" />

      <label for="contact-message">Message</label>
      <textarea id="contact-message" name="message" rows="6" required></textarea>

      <button class="download-button" type="submit">Send Enquiry</button>
    </form>
  </section>
</section>

<script>
function forceCloseDetailModal(id) {
  const modal = document.getElementById(id);
  if (modal) modal.style.display = 'none';
}

function closeDetailModal(id, event) {
  if (event && event.target && event.target.classList.contains('detail-modal')) {
    forceCloseDetailModal(id);
  }
}

function initTimelineInteractions(root) {
  const yearButtons = Array.from(root.querySelectorAll('.dneg-year'));
  const yearBlocks = Array.from(root.querySelectorAll('.dneg-year-block'));
  const clickableCards = Array.from(root.querySelectorAll('.dneg-card-clickable'));

  function setActive(year) {
    yearButtons.forEach((button) => {
      button.classList.toggle('is-active', button.textContent.trim() === year);
    });
  }

  yearButtons.forEach((button) => {
    button.addEventListener('click', () => {
      const id = button.dataset.target;
      const target = document.getElementById(id);
      if (target) target.scrollIntoView({ behavior: 'smooth', block: 'start' });
    });
  });

  clickableCards.forEach((card) => {
    const detailId = card.dataset.detail;
    const open = () => {
      const modal = document.getElementById(detailId);
      if (modal) modal.style.display = 'flex';
    };

    card.addEventListener('click', open);
    card.addEventListener('keydown', (event) => {
      if (event.key === 'Enter' || event.key === ' ') {
        event.preventDefault();
        open();
      }
    });
  });

  const observer = new IntersectionObserver(
    (entries) => {
      const visible = entries
        .filter((entry) => entry.isIntersecting)
        .sort((a, b) => b.intersectionRatio - a.intersectionRatio)[0];

      if (visible) setActive(visible.target.dataset.year);
    },
    { threshold: [0.2, 0.4, 0.6, 0.8] }
  );

  yearBlocks.forEach((block) => observer.observe(block));
  if (yearBlocks[0]) setActive(yearBlocks[0].dataset.year);
}

(function () {
  const tabButtons = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('.tab-btn'));
  const tabPanels = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('.tab-panel'));
  const contactForm = document.getElementById('contact-form');

  function activateTab(name) {
    tabButtons.forEach((button) => button.classList.toggle('is-active', button.dataset.tab === name));
    tabPanels.forEach((panel) => panel.classList.toggle('is-active', panel.dataset.panel === name));
  }

  tabButtons.forEach((button) => {
    button.addEventListener('click', () => activateTab(button.dataset.tab));
  });

  initTimelineInteractions(document);

  if (contactForm) {
    contactForm.addEventListener('submit', (event) => {
      event.preventDefault();

      const name = document.getElementById('contact-name').value || '';
      const email = document.getElementById('contact-email').value || '';
      const subject = document.getElementById('contact-subject').value || 'Website enquiry';
      const message = document.getElementById('contact-message').value || '';

      if (!name.trim() || !email.trim() || !message.trim()) {
        alert('Please complete name, email, and message.');
        return;
      }

      const fullSubject = encodeURIComponent(subject + ' - from ' + name.trim());
      const body = encodeURIComponent(
        'Name: ' + name.trim() + '\n' +
        'Email: ' + email.trim() + '\n\n' +
        message.trim()
      );

      window.location.href = 'mailto:abhirsc@outlook.com?subject=' + fullSubject + '&body=' + body;
    });
  }

  document.addEventListener('keydown', (event) => {
    if (event.key !== 'Escape') return;
    document.querySelectorAll('.detail-modal').forEach((modal) => {
      modal.style.display = 'none';
    });
  });
})();
</script>
```
